b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Temporal Validity"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Facts can expire or be superseded:"}]
d:["$","$L1b",null,{"code":"# Add a fact\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-01\",\n  confidence=0.90,\n)\n\n# Update with new information (old fact auto-expires)\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-15\",\n  confidence=0.95,\n)\n\n# Query current facts only\nfacts = mem.query_facts(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  current_only=True,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
e:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Queries"}]
f:["$","$L1b",null,{"code":"# Direct lookup\nfacts = mem.query_facts(subject=\"Alice\")\n\n# Relationship traversal\nrelated = mem.traverse(subject=\"Alice\", depth=2)\n\n# Pattern matching\nmatches = mem.query_facts(\n  predicate=\"reports_to\",\n  object=\"Carol\",\n)\n","language":"python"}]
10:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Extraction from Working Memory"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne automatically extracts triples during consolidation:"}]
12:["$","$L1c",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  WM[Working Memory Entry] -->|NLP extraction| T[Candidate Triples]\n  T -->|confidence &gt; 0.7| SM[Semantic Memory]\n  T -->|confidence &lt; 0.7| DISCARD[Discard]\n"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"Extraction uses a lightweight local model (no API calls) and runs during sleep cycles."}]
